sigWerErrors.reason: 'trăm' means 'hundred', so 'hai trăm sáu mươi sáu' is 266, while 'hai sáu sáu' is 266 as well. The insertion does not change the numeric value, just the way it is spoken (full form vs. digit-by-digit).
'mươi' is part of the full number pronunciation in Vietnamese, but the meaning (266) is preserved. This is a stylistic difference, not a semantic one.
